task_description: Implement Chapter 2: 'The Market of Mandatory Commerce'. Full play sequence from Stokeport Market through Forest Trail, Shrine puzzle, Tax Collector Badger boss fight, and Questbook Page 2 return. Includes new maps, enemies, BarkEvents, Questbook reactions, and UI state machine wiring.

verification.summary: 145 tests pass (0 failures) across 19 test suites. New Chapter 2 tests: 32 tests covering TaxCollectorController (7), QuestbookReactions (13), Combat (6), Pipeline (6). Build compiles successfully. Post-review fix: added missing director.enterRoom() calls for shrine and boss room contexts in SliceScreen.kt.
